info.name: My Collection
info.description:
### Welcome to Postman! This is your first collection. 

Collections are your starting point for building and testing APIs. You can use this one to:

• Group related requests
• Test your API in real-world scenarios
• Document and share your requests

Update the name and overview whenever you’re ready to make it yours.

[Learn more about Postman Collections.](https://learning.postman.com/docs/collections/collections-overview/)

  "slug": "chalain-110-roebuck-road-clonskeagh-d14-k0t8-d14-k0t8",
  "status": "publish",
  "type": "property",
  "link": "https://ckp.ie/property/chalain-110-roebuck-road-clonskeagh-d14-k0t8-d14-k0t8/",
  "title": {
    "rendered": "Chalain, 110 Roebuck Road, Clonskeagh, D14 K0T8"
  },
  "content": {
    "rendered": "\u003Cp\u003EWelcome to Chalain, a spacious detached home on a generous and sunny 1/4 acre plot. This property was bought new off plans in 1989 by the current owners. It has been the perfect home for raising their family, and entertaining their grandchildren. The time has come for a new owner to appreciate the joys of this delightful property as they move to somewhere more suited to their needs. With their French connections they have loved the sunny aspect and generous conservatory.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003ETo ensure proper spacing of viewings, Casey-Kennedy Estate Agents request that viewers register in advance by email. We will contact you to schedule an exact viewing time within the advertised time range.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003EThis property is marketed using a video and additional photographs showing rooms which have been virtually staged using AI. NB: The rooms themselves have not been changed – just the furnishings. The virtually staged photos are clearly annotated and shown immediately after the original images, so you can clearly see the differences.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003ETo the front of this property is a neat and colourful front lawn with attractive planting and a curved driveway with space for multiple cars, leading to cast iron electric gates recessed off the main Roebuck Road.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003EOne of the joys of this home is the large westerly facing side garden privately secluded behind inner electric wooden gates. This has parking for two additional cars and a lovely sunny paved patio surrounded by mature lavender plants – like you would expect to find in Chalain.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003EThe southwesterly facing back garden and conservatory are flooded with sunshine from 10am to dusk – making this a very bright home, with plenty of solar gain. The children`s play area with slide, swing and see-saw are included in the sale. A block-built shed with pitched roof and window could be converted into a playhouse or artists studio.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003EThe generously proportioned accommodation comprises an entrance porch opening to a hall with staircase to the right of which is a playroom / study overlooking the front garden. To the right of the hall are interconnecting main reception rooms stretching 12.7m from front to back with a bow window to the front and French doors opening to a large conservatory to the back. A second set of French doors leads back into the country-style painted wood kitchen. The adjacent utility room has a secure composite back door opening to the side garden.  Off the hall is a guest WC and an under-stairs storage room containing the condensing gas boiler.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003EThis deceptively spacious home benefits from five good-sized bedrooms on the first floor, all with fitted wardrobes. The two large front bedrooms have dual windows each one of which has a well-appointed en-suite shower room. A family bathroom and a large hot press completes the first-floor accommodation. From the first floor landing, the staircase continues up to three attic rooms providing an abundance of additional space. \u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003EChalain has been well tended and maintained over the years. The heating system was upgraded and the cavity walls pumped with insulation. This has given it a respectable B3 BER rating – qualifying it for the lower rate green mortgages.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003EThe 285 sq.m floor area includes 52 sq.m in attic rooms and a 23 sq.m. conservatory.  These are both original to the house. Thy are very usable spaces. The attic has a current max ceiling height of 2.27m and is not currently considered habitable space. However the roof apex height is close to 3.1m giving plenty of height for a potentially habitable attic conversion (S.P.P).\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003EThere is a great range of highly regarded schools nearby including Lycée Français International, St. Killian`s German School, Our Lady`s Grove primary and secondary schools, Gaelscoil Laighean, Goatstown Educate Together primary school, Mount Anville primary and secondary schools and The Islamic Cultural Centre hosts the NurulHuda Quranic School and Muslim National School. Within easy cycling distance you have Scoil San Treasa, Colaiste Iosagain, Colaiste Eoin,and  Oatlands College.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003EFor a maturing and studious family (or those interested in sports scholarships), a walkway leads directly into UCD, though a wicket gate, opposite the turn to Harlech Grove, less than 100 yards from the gate.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003EAt the top of Mount Anville hill, 15 minutes walk away, is the delightful Deerpark Park with well-equipped playgrounds, tennis courts, playing fields and walks with expansive views over Dublin Bay.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003EThe area is served by the number 11 and S6 bus routes.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003EEarly viewing is highly recommended.\u003C/p\u003E\n",
    "protected": false
  },
  "excerpt": {
    "rendered": "\u003Cp\u003Edetached 5 bed\u003C/p\u003E\n",
    "protected": false
  },

  "property_accommodation": "\u003Cp\u003E\u003Cb\u003EPorch - 4m (13'1\") x 1.5m (4'11\")\u003C/b\u003E\u003Cbr /\u003ETiled porch. Light.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E\u003Cb\u003ECoat lobby - 2.32m (7'7\") x 1.25m (4'1\")\u003C/b\u003E\u003Cbr /\u003EWood flooring. Dual aspect glazing. Hardwood front door. Inner storm door.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E\u003Cb\u003EEntrance Hall - 5.34m (17'6\") x 4m (13'1\")\u003C/b\u003E\u003Cbr /\u003ESolid wood flooring. Coving. Centre Rise. Under-stairs storage room with window (1.94m x 1.00m)\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E\u003Cb\u003EInterconnecting reception rooms - 12.7m (41'8\") x 4.13m (13'7\")\u003C/b\u003E\u003Cbr /\u003EBay window to front. French doors to rear opening to conservatory. Carpeted sitting room. Solid wood flooring in dining area. Coving and cenrtre roses. Interconnecting hardwood double doors with glazed panels.Fireplace with stone hearth and hardwood mantle.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E\u003Cb\u003ELounge /Playroom - 4.54m (14'11\") x 2.6m (8'6\")\u003C/b\u003E\u003Cbr /\u003EWindow to front. Solid wood flooring. Coving and centre rose.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E\u003Cb\u003EKitchen - 6.12m (20'1\") x 4m (13'1\")\u003C/b\u003E\u003Cbr /\u003EFitted kitchen. Iintegrated appliances induction hob, double oven, included in sale. French doors to conservatory.Tiled floor. Large kitchen window. Attractive blue tiled splashback.Door to utility room.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E\u003Cb\u003EUtility Room - 2.02m (6'8\") x 1.67m (5'6\")\u003C/b\u003E\u003Cbr /\u003ETiled floor. Counter top. Washing machine. Fridge-freezer. Door to side garden.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E\u003Cb\u003EGuest WC - 2.62m (8'7\") x 1.07m (3'6\")\u003C/b\u003E\u003Cbr /\u003ETiled floor. Frosted glass window. WC. WHB with cabinet under.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E\u003Cb\u003EConservatory - 8.28m (27'2\") x 2.8m (9'2\")\u003C/b\u003E\u003Cbr /\u003ELovely bright space extending the full width of the house. Very private. Tiled floor. Perspex roof. Two large SW facing windows to back garden. Door to side garden. wall lights.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E\u003Cb\u003EFIRST FLOOR\u003C/b\u003E\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E\u003Cb\u003ELanding - 5.36m (17'7\") x 4m (13'1\")\u003C/b\u003E\u003Cbr /\u003EWood flooring. Window on 1/2 landing. Stairs to attic rooms. Large hot press (1.72 x 1.58m).\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E\u003Cb\u003EMain bedroom - 5.24m (17'2\") x 4.1m (13'5\")\u003C/b\u003E\u003Cbr /\u003EFitted wardrobe with dressing table and mirror. Wood flooring. Wall lights Two windows to front. Door to ensuite.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E\u003Cb\u003EEnsuite - 2.54m (8'4\") x 1.67m (5'6\")\u003C/b\u003E\u003Cbr /\u003EFully tiled. Mira electric shower with glass shower screen. WC. WHB. Storage press.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E\u003Cb\u003EBedroom 2 - 4m (13'1\") x 3.93m (12'11\")\u003C/b\u003E\u003Cbr /\u003EFitted wardrobe with dressing table and mirror. Wood flooring. Wall lights Two windows to front.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E\u003Cb\u003EBedroom 3 - 5.02m (16'6\") x 4.15m (13'7\")\u003C/b\u003E\u003Cbr /\u003EFitted wardrobe with dressing table and mirror. Wood flooring. Wall lights Window to back.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E\u003Cb\u003Ebedroom 4 - 4.33m (14'2\") x 2.53m (8'4\")\u003C/b\u003E\u003Cbr /\u003EWood flooring. Wall lights Windows to back.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E\u003Cb\u003EBedroom 5 - 2.76m (9'1\") x 2.76m (9'1\")\u003C/b\u003E\u003Cbr /\u003ESingle bedroom. Window to rear. Wood flooring. Wardrobe.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E\u003Cb\u003EBathroom - 2.5m (8'2\") x 2.28m (7'6\")\u003C/b\u003E\u003Cbr /\u003EFrosted glass window. Tiled froor. Bathtub with shower fitting, plus a separate shower cubicle with an electric shower.. WC. WHB.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E\u003Cb\u003EATTIC LEVEL\u003C/b\u003E\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E\u003Cb\u003EAttic landing - 3.62m (11'11\") x 1.4m (4'7\")\u003C/b\u003E\u003Cbr /\u003EWood flooring. Recessed lighting. Ceiling height 2.27m. Roof apex height approx. 3.1m.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E\u003Cb\u003EAttic Room 1 - 5.3m (17'5\") x 4.56m (15'0\")\u003C/b\u003E\u003Cbr /\u003ESpacious attic room with skylight. Wood flooring. Max ceiling height 2.27m. Roof apex height approx 3.1m.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E\u003Cb\u003EAttic room 2 - 4.56m (15'0\") x 4.56m (15'0\")\u003C/b\u003E\u003Cbr /\u003ESpacious attic room with skylight. Wood flooring. Built in desk. Max ceiling height 2.27m. Roof apex height approx 3.1m.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E\u003Cb\u003EAttic room 3 - 2.2m (7'3\") x 2.13m (7'0\")\u003C/b\u003E\u003Cbr /\u003ESkylight. Wood flooring. Recessed lighting. Used as office space.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E\u003Cb\u003EAttic store - 1.5m (4'11\") x 1.14m (3'9\")\u003C/b\u003E\u003Cbr /\u003EWater tank.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E\u003Cb\u003EFront Garden - 22m (72'2\") x 20m (65'7\")\u003C/b\u003E\u003Cbr /\u003ESpacious front garden with electric gates, recessed from the main road. Front lawn with flowerbed planted with colourful camelia shrubs. Driveway with parking for 3+ cars. Electric double gates to side and rear gardens.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E\u003Cb\u003ESide garden - 13m (42'8\") x 10m (32'10\")\u003C/b\u003E\u003Cbr /\u003ELarge westerly facing side garden with discrete parking for two more cars behind electric gates.. Sunny paved patio area surrounded by lavender plants.\u003C/p\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E\u003Cb\u003EBack Garden - 20m (65'7\") x 13.5m (44'3\")\u003C/b\u003E\u003Cbr /\u003ELovely sunny southerly facing back garden. Children`s play set with swings, slide and see-saw. Back lawn. Block built garden shed 4.22m x 3.46m with concrete floor and window.\u003C/p\u003E\n",

request.description:
This is a GET request and it is used to "get" data from an endpoint. There is no request body for a GET request, but you can use query parameters to help specify the resource you want data on (e.g., in this request, we have `id=1`).

A successful GET response will have a `200 OK` status, and should include some kind of response body - for example, HTML web content or JSON data.
